title: Split core and plan Python boundary
summary: Move residual plan-domain runtime out of watchtower_core.plan_runtime and behind a plan-owned Python boundary under plan/**.
scope_items: Define the approved plan-owned Python boundary under plan/**.
Move residual plan-domain runtime, query, sync, and validation services out of watchtower_core.plan_runtime.
Update CLI, docs, tests, and validation so reusable core imports no longer depend directly on plan-domain Python.
done_when_items: watchtower_core.plan_runtime no longer owns active plan-domain runtime in the clean endstate.
Plan-domain Python lives behind an approved boundary under plan/** and reusable core stays pack-agnostic.
Validation and test suites pass after the boundary cutover.
